channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Army clears Niger Republic resident of terror allegations
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Nigerian Army has cleared a Niger Republic resident, Aboubakar Muhammad Zein-Nur, of terror allegations after investigations found no links to terroris
Read More: https://punchng.com/army-clears-niger-republic-resident-of-terror-allegations/

item.title: My marriage breakup left me battling depression, says Ubi Franklin
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Music executive Ubi Franklin reveals he battled severe depression and made suicide attempts after his marriage to Lilian Esoro ended. Learn about his journ
Read More: https://punchng.com/my-marriage-breakup-left-me-battling-depression-says-ubi-franklin/

item.title: NYSC begins free medical outreach in Abia community
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The NYSC has launched a free medical outreach in Abia, providing essential healthcare services to rural dwellers. Learn more about this vital initiative.
Read More: https://punchng.com/nysc-begins-free-medical-outreach-in-abia-community/

item.title: Bayelsa suspends unhygienic processing of imported cowhides
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Bayelsa State Government has suspended the unhygienic processing of imported cowhides (ponmo) due to serious public health risks. A task force will enforce
Read More: https://punchng.com/bayelsa-suspends-unhygienic-processing-of-imported-cowhides/

item.title: Oyo APC faults Makinde over suit restraining EFCC from contract records
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Oyo APC criticises Governor Makinde’s suit restraining EFCC from contract records, raising concerns about accountability in public office.
Read More: https://punchng.com/oyo-apc-faults-makinde-over-suit-restraining-efcc-from-contract-records/

item.title: UK updates list of items travellers can, can’t bring into country
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Planning a trip to the UK? Understand the updated UK travel rules on alcohol, tobacco, and other goods. Avoid issues with customs by knowing what’s allowed
Read More: https://punchng.com/uk-updates-list-of-items-travellers-can-cant-bring-into-country/

item.title: Does Benvenuto Cellini have what it takes to win King George?
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Trainer Aidan O'Brien has won the King George four times in his stellar career and hopes Irish Derby hero Benvenuto Cellini can mix it with the older horses at Ascot this Saturday.

item.title: EPL: Arsenal sign Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34m
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Arsenal bolster their attack, signing Greece international Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34m. Discover what the versatile forward brings to the Gun
Read More: https://punchng.com/epl-arsenal-sign-tzolis-from-club-brugge-for-34m/

item.title: Oyo Assembly approves Makinde’s annual leave, deputy gov to act
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Oyo State House of Assembly approves Governor Seyi Makinde’s annual leave from August 10 to September 11, 2026. Deputy Governor Adebayo Lawal to act.
Read More: https://punchng.com/oyo-assembly-approves-makindes-annual-leave-deputy-gov-to-act/

item.title: We thought we would die, Jigawa canoe accident survivors recount ordeal
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Survivors of the Jigawa canoe accident in Malamawar Yandutse recount their terrifying ordeal, praising rescuers and appealing for a bridge to prevent futur
Read More: https://punchng.com/we-thought-we-would-die-jigawa-canoe-accident-survivors-recount-ordeal/

item.title: Delta monarch awards full scholarship to Spelling Bee world champion
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Asagba of Asaba, Delta State, awards a full university scholarship to Chinedu Okediachi, Nigeria’s Spelling Bee World Cup gold medalist.
Read More: https://punchng.com/delta-monarch-awards-full-scholarship-to-spelling-bee-world-champion/

item.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

item.title: Why Villa could offer Garnacho the perfect route to redemption
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: At the age of just 22, Alejandro Garnacho's career is at a crossroads, but his move to Aston Villa, driven by Unai Emery, offers the perfect chance to get it back on track.

item.title: Tinubu deserves re-election, says Saka Ahmed
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: ….urges Interior Minister to contest governorship election in Ondo. By Lawani Mikairu President Bola Tinubu re-election bid has received a boost with a prominent son of Ondo State residing in Lagos, Mr Saka Ola Ahmed, declaring his support for him in the coming 2027 presidential election. This is ju

item.title: Ibadan council boss demolishes criminal hideout in Apata

item.description: Executive Chairman, Ibadan South West Local Government, Ambassador Kehinde Adeyemi Akande, has reaffirmed his administration's commitment to The post Ibadan council boss demolishes criminal hideout in Apata appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Oyo Assembly approves Makinde’s request to proceed on annual vacation
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Oyo State House of Assembly has approved the request of Governor Seyi Makinde to proceed on Annual vacation with effect from August 10, 2026 with subsequent transmission of power to the Deputy Governor, Barr. Bayo Lawal. The approval followed the consideration of a formal correspondence from Gov

item.title: Delta approves financial assistance to 533 Law School graduates
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: At least 533 graduates from Delta State who successfully completed the Nigerian Law School in the 2025 session can now celebrate, as the state government has approved the disbursement of financial assistance to support human capital development and alleviate the financial burden on these young profe

item.title: Police relaunch anti-cult campaign in Rivers
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Rivers State Police Command has relaunched the Police Campaign Against Cultism and Other Vices, POCACOV, in line with the directive of the Inspector-General of Police, Olatunji Rilwan Disu. The initiative is part of a renewed nationwide effort to tackle cultism, drug abuse, youth violence, and o

item.title: Court declines to hear Miyetti Allah president’s plea to vary bail conditions
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The EFCC accused Bodejo of accepting 100,000 dollars from Sa’idu Abubakar a former Accountant-General (AG) of Bauchi State who is currently in the lawful custody of the Nigerian Police Force, among other cash in hard currency.

item.title: OPINION: FCT @ 50: Renewed Hope, Purposeful Leadership And Socio-Economic Transformation Of Abuja
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: As the Federal Capital Territory (FCT) marks fifty years of its creation, Abuja stands today as a compelling symbol of national unity, strategic planning, and purposeful governance. From a modest vision conceived in 1976, the nation’s capital has evolved into one of Africa’s fastest-grow

item.description: Imagi announced a $4.5 million seed round, with investors including Brighteye Ventures, Day One Capital, and artist Wil.i.am.

item.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the Moon
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

item.title: The new Halo remake is a reminder of what Xbox used to be
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: It's impossible to talk about a new Xbox game without also talking about the state of Xbox. Microsoft's gaming division is in freefall: Recent headlines are dominated by extensive layoffs, decimated studios, and confusing strategies, most of which stem from years of bad decisions and expensive acqui

item.title: Amazon’s best 4K streaming sticks are up to 40 percent off
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: There’s no shortage of great shows and movies to watch, but discovering something new isn’t always easy. Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Plus and Fire TV Stick 4K Max come with redesigned software that aims to make it easier to finding something you’ll like, and both 4K-ready streaming s

item.title: Nigeria’s external reserves hit $52.73bn as CBN reports strong gains
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The CBN governor also revealed that net external reserves had recorded a dramatic increase, climbing from $3.99 billion in 2023 to more than $40 billion, representing a rise of over 900 per cent.

item.description: A Louisiana pastor has been found guilty of stealing more than $340,000 from two churches by diverting church funds into his The post How Louisiana pastor stole $340,000 from two churches to fund gambling, luxury spending appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: UK cancels military training in Kenya over permit dispute
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Kenya hosts a permanent base for the British Army Training Unit Kenya (BATUK) in Laikipia, about 200 kilometres (130 miles) north of Nairobi. The post UK cancels military training in Kenya over permit dispute appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Chairman of First HoldCo Plc, Femi Otedola, has strengthened his position in the financial services group after acquiring additional shares valued at ₦77.6 billion in a fresh transaction executed through his investment vehicle, Calvados Global Services Limited. The post Otedola tightens grip on Firs

item.title: Ekiti Govt Denies Role In APC Chieftain Olawumi’s Arrest
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Ekiti State Government on Thursday denied any involvement in the arrest of All Progressives Congress (APC) chieftain, Mrs. Abimbola Olajumoke Olawumi, insisting it neither ordered nor had prior knowledge of any police action against her. The government said allegations linking it to Olawumi&#821

item.title: Sydney Talker Opens Up On Celibacy Journey
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigerian skit maker and content creator Sydney Egere, better known as Sydney Talker, has opened up about his celibacy journey. Speaking in a video message shared via his social media page on Thursday, the skitmaker revealed that he has been practising abstinence for almost four years. According to h

The votes came from 311 senators present at Thursday’s plenary session. TVC News had earlier reported that the House of Representatives withdrew its own version and began del

item.title: Garnacho joins Aston Villa on season-long loan from Chelsea
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The winger is Villa's fourth signing of the summer transfer window following the arrivals of Johan Manzambi, Joao Gomes and Modou Keba Cisse at the Europa League champions. The post Garnacho joins Aston Villa on season-long loan from Chelsea appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Amazon is bringing games to Prime Video
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Amazon is hoping the addition of games can turn Prime Video into a one-stop entertainment destination, borrowing a strategy from Netflix, which has increasingly embraced party games over the past several years.

item.title: Makinde Proceeds On Annual Leave, Transfers Power To Deputy
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Oyo State House of Assembly has approved Governor Seyi Makinde’s request to proceed on his annual leave, paving the way for deputy governor, Barr. Bayo Lawal, to oversee the affairs of the state during the governor’s absence. ‎ ‎The leave is scheduled to commence on August 10 and end on September 11

item.description: Samsung has officially launched One UI 9, its latest Android interface, alongside the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip 8.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Newcastle United have reached an agreement worth up to £34 million to sign highly-rated Monaco midfielder Aladji Bamba, as the Magpies continue their squad rebuild following the departure of Sandro Tonali. The 20-year-old French midfielder is expected to arrive on Tyneside on Thursday to undergo a m

item.title: Court sentences three men linked to Oyo school abduction to life imprisonment
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The three convicts were jailed for six offences, and they will stand trial on the four remaining charges to which they pleaded not guilty. The post Court sentences three men linked to Oyo school abduction to life imprisonment appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.description: MeBeMe delivers small tasks to help users become their best selves instead of endlessly scrolling.

item.description: Tzolis scored 43 goals in 108 appearances for Brugge and featured in the Belgian side's 3-0 Champions League loss to Arsenal last season. The post Arsenal seal £34m deal for winger Tzolis from Brugge appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Football clubs urged to ease police cost burden on taxpayers
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Football clubs are urged to contribute more to the cost of match policing to ease the burden on taxpayers, as incident figures for the 2025-26 season are published.

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Promoter Eddie Hearn said history has shown that Anthony Joshua has never withdrawn from a fight as he responded to Tyson Fury's recent claims that the all-British heavyweight battle might not happen.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Fresh fears are being entertained among residents of Ifite Awka Village over alleged plot by suspected gunmen to establish camps at the area where the four Fulani herders were killed last two days. Security reports have it that the attack was a ploy to scare away visitors to the bush in a bid toward

item.description: By Vincent Ujumadu The third daughter of Anambra State Governor, Prof. Chukwuma Soludo, Oduko Soludo, has graduated with a First-Class Honours degree in Neuroscience from the University of Nottingham, United Kingdom. Her mother, Mrs. Nonye Soludo, congratulated her on the achievement, describing it

item.title: Why Iheanacho Chooses Bursaspor Project Over Celtic Stay
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria international Kelechi Iheanacho has explained why he rejected the opportunity to remain at Celtic, revealing that Bursaspor’s ambitious long-term vision convinced him to continue his career in Turkey. The 29-year-old striker admitted he instructed his representative to do everything possible

item.description: The dollar got a boost Thursday from haven flows as the war in the Middle East intensified, pushing oil prices above $100 a barrel.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: A House of Representatives, Hon. Inuwa Garba (APC–Gombe), has pledged to champion initiatives aimed at promoting peace and finding lasting solutions to the protracted farmer-herder conflict in Nigeria. Garba, who represents Yamaltu/Deba Federal Constituency of Gombe State, made the commitment on Thu

item.title: Alphabet’s massive profit growth is just an illusion, as SpaceX and Anthropic help mask a historic cash drain
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Earnings quadrupled on paper, but an analyst calls that an “illusory” performance propped up by unrealized gains from equity investments.

item.title: An Analysis of SAP SE (SAP) in the AI Transition Era
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: Injury Blow As Johnson-Thompson, Asher-Smith Out Of Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Team England have suffered a major setback ahead of the athletics programme at the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games after several of their biggest stars withdrew through injury. World and Olympic medallist Katarina Johnson-Thompson headlines the absentees after pulling out of the women’s heptathlon,

item.title: Russia Says Its Black Sea Waters Not Safe for Ships Amid Attacks
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Russia warned that it was unsafe to navigate in its Black Sea waters after Ukraine ramped up attacks on ships.

item.title: Three Persons Linked to Oyo Schools Kidnapping Bags Life Improvement
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Alex Enumah in Abuja A Federal High Court, in Abuja, has sentenced to life imprisonment three terrorists connected with the recent abduction of some school children and their teachers in

item.title: Digital firm emerges winner at 10th Hackathon anniversary in clean energy
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Current Creators, a digital firm, has emerged as the winner of the just-concluded All On 10th Anniversary Hackathon with its "ColdLink" concept, outperforming other contestants. The post Digital firm emerges winner at 10th Hackathon anniversary in clean energy appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: NDIC Kicks Off Sensitisation Campaign On Protection Of Bank Deposits
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC) has stepped up its financial awareness campaign for young Nigerians to enhance their financial literacy and protect bank deposits and other valuable assets from risks. The Principal Manager, Communication and Public Affairs, NDIC, Mr. Toke Afolayan, s

item.title: Writing by Hand is Good for your Brain
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://nealstephenson.substack.com/p/writing-by-hand-is-good-for-your Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=49022152 Points: 26 # Comments: 1
